chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Criminal Misc. Application No.391 of 2024 (The State v. Bank Alfallah Karachi and 02 others) ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE: ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF THE JUDGE 1. For order on M.A. No.4868/2024 2. For order on M.A. No.4869/2024 3. For hearing of main case 26.04.2024 Mr. Muhammad Anwar Mahar, DDPP ------------------------- 1. Urgency granted. 2-3. By way of the instant Crl. Misc. Application u/s 94 r/w Section 561-A Cr.PC a direction has been sought by the State against Operation Manager, Bank Alfalah, Fish Harbour Branch, Karachi, to produce certain documents necessary for the investigation of case outcome of FIR Crime No.381/2023 under Section 489-F, 420, 34 PPC PS Docks Keamari Karachi South. Head arguments and perused the record. If for the sake of arguments, it is believed that the Operation Manager, Bank Alfalah, Fish Harbour Branch, Karachi, has failed to produce the documents required for the investigation of the subject case, then he could have proceeded with in terms of Section 175 PPC. If the Investigating Officer has no intention to take action against him for such omission under the said penal section, then alternatively subject to the law he could approach the Magistrate/Sessions Judge having jurisdiction for the purpose. No case for indulgence by this Court is made out. Consequently, the instant Crl. Misc. Application is dismissed in limine. J U D G E Nadir*
